novel_features.name: Cross-video transcript search
novel_features.description: FTS5 search across every cached clip transcript in your workspace; returns video, clip, and timecode hits in milliseconds.

novel_features.name: Watch-milestone digest
novel_features.description: Roll up webhook view-milestone events into a per-video summary over a window (e.g. who crossed 75% in the last 7 days).

novel_features.name: Webhook tail + replay
novel_features.description: Stream new webhook events from the inbox to stdout, and replay any prior message to a local URL with valid HMAC headers — no public tunnel needed.

novel_features.name: Bulk standard edit pass
novel_features.description: Apply a chained set of edits (remove-fillers, remove-buffers, trim-edges, trim-silences-gt N, find-mistakes [unofficial]) across every clip in a playlist in one command.

novel_features.name: Transcript diff (cut vs uncut)
novel_features.description: Diff a clip's cut transcript against its uncut transcript to surface every word that editing removed (filler, silence, hand-edit) with timecodes.

novel_features.name: Upload-to-edit workflow
novel_features.description: Create a Tella source, upload local video bytes to the pre-signed URL, then add the source as a new clip without leaving the CLI.

novel_features.name: Exports waitlist
novel_features.description: Kick off exports for one or more videos and block until each is ready, short-circuiting on the Export ready webhook event.

novel_features.name: Caption-file export
novel_features.description: Format a clip's cut transcript as an SRT or VTT subtitle file ready to attach to an embed or upload.

novel_features.name: Workspace stats
novel_features.description: Local aggregate of video count, clip count, total duration, transcript word count, and export count by month across the cached workspace.

novel_features.name: Declarative video storyboard
novel_features.description: Export a full editable timeline and apply a reviewed JSON edit plan across video settings, clips, cuts, and transcript cuts.

novel_features.name: One-shot media insertion
novel_features.description: Upload local media into a Tella source and attach it as a clip or B-roll layout media from one workflow command.

novel_features.name: Transcript-driven repairs
novel_features.description: Plan and apply transcript-index cuts, optionally inserting replacement media for surgical corrections.

novel_features.name: Pre-publish edit QA
novel_features.description: Scan a video timeline for likely issues such as long silences before export or sharing.

novel_features.name: Playlist-scale edit planning
novel_features.description: Plan a standard remove-fillers/remove-buffers/trim-edges/export recipe across every video in a playlist.

novel_features.name: Safe clip clean workflow
novel_features.description: Plan/apply a standard per-clip cleanup pass (remove-fillers, remove-buffers, trim-edges, optional AI mistakes) with automatic pre-apply cut snapshots.

novel_features.name: Cut rollback workflow
novel_features.description: Restore the latest saved cuts snapshot or an explicit cuts JSON body so compound edit passes are reversible.
